'''Tim Eldred''' is an artist. He was an illustrator for many of the [[West End Games]] sourcebooks.

{{Artist-stub}}

*''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]''
*''[[Heroes & Rogues]]''
*''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''

*''[[The Kathol Outback]]''
*''[[Endgame]]''
